summary: A comprehensive PRD for an advanced PDF to Word conversion tool named 'ProPDF Reverse Converter'. Covers complete iLovePDF function mapping (~20 functions), 150+ ProPDF features across 15 modules including AI-powered OCR, intelligent table reconstruction, layout-aware extraction, multi-format output, handwriting recognition, batch processing, developer API, document intelligence, and more. Includes competitive analysis, user personas, technical architecture, monetization, roadmap, and risk analysis.
